services.headline: Three Ways We Eliminate Busywork
services.subtitle: From quick-win automation workflows to AI agents and custom platforms — we start where your biggest time sink is

automations.title: Process Automations
automations.description: We map your manual workflows and replace them with n8n automations that run 24/7, connect your existing tools, and never make human errors.
features: Eliminate data entry, copy-paste, and manual handoffs
Connect CRM, email, calendar, Slack, and 300+ more tools
Error handling, retries, and real-time monitoring included
From simple triggers to complex multi-step pipelines

agents.title: AI Agents
agents.description: For the complex tasks that still need intelligence — customer support, document processing, research — we deploy AI agents that work while your team sleeps.
features: Multi-step task orchestration with LLM reasoning
Autonomous decision loops with human-in-the-loop guardrails
Deploy as APIs, Slack bots, or embedded in your existing tools

saas.title: Custom Software & SaaS
saas.description: When off-the-shelf tools don't fit your operations, we build the exact platform your business needs — launched in weeks, built to scale.
features: Launch a production-ready platform in 6–8 weeks
Scalable architecture that grows with your business
AI-native features powered by frontier models
Modern stack: React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and cloud infra

features.description: We combine startup speed with enterprise-grade architecture. Launch fast, validate your idea, and be ready to scale when success hits.
features.f1Text: Get to market fast with our proven development sprint system. No endless development cycles — just rapid, focused execution.
features.f2Text: Built on a modern tech stack with clean architecture. When you need to scale, your codebase won't hold you back.
features.f3Text: Analytics and user feedback tools built-in. Track key metrics and gather insights from day one.
features.f4Text: Security and compliance built-in from the start. Ready for enterprise customers when opportunity knocks.
features.f5Text: We're your tech co-founder. Get expert guidance on architecture decisions, scaling strategy, and technical roadmap.
features.f6Text: You own all the code. Clean, documented, and ready for your team to take over when you scale.
features.bottomText: Ready to turn your idea into reality?

benefits.description: Every hour spent on data entry, copy-paste, and status updates is an hour not spent on growth. Here's exactly what we change.
benefits.b1Text: Teams that automate with us consistently recover 20+ hours per week on tasks that used to demand constant manual attention.
benefits.b2Text: Manual processes introduce mistakes. Automated ones don't. Your data stays accurate, your customers stay happy.
benefits.b3Text: CRM, billing, support, calendar — we wire your stack together so information flows automatically, no middleman required.
benefits.b4Text: All workflows, code, and agent configs are handed over to you at delivery. No vendor lock-in, no hidden dependencies.
benefits.bottomTitle: Ready to See What You're Losing?
benefits.bottomText: Book a free 30-minute audit and we'll map exactly where your team is wasting time — and what it would cost to fix it.

showcase.block1Text: Transform complex business processes into simple, automated workflows. Our intuitive drag-and-drop interface makes it easy to design, deploy, and manage workflows that save time and reduce errors.
showcase.block1Point1: Drag-and-drop workflow builder with 200+ pre-built templates
showcase.block2Text: Make data-driven decisions with comprehensive analytics and real-time insights. Track performance, identify trends, and optimize your operations with advanced reporting tools.
showcase.bottomText: Join companies already using ORION to eliminate manual work and accelerate growth.

testimonials.description: Results from founders and ops leaders who stopped doing things manually.
testimonials.t1Quote: "From idea to funded startup in 7 weeks. ORION built our MVP with the perfect balance of speed and scalability. We raised $2M seed round within 3 months of launch."
testimonials.t2Quote: "ORION delivered our MVP in 6 weeks. The architecture is so clean that our in-house team took over seamlessly. Hit $10K MRR in month 2."
testimonials.t3Quote: "Enterprise-grade MVP in 8 weeks. The architecture and documentation were so good, we passed our enterprise security review on the first try. Now at $50K MRR."
testimonials.bottomTitle: Could your business run this smoothly?
testimonials.bottomText: Book a free audit call and we'll show you exactly what we'd automate for your operations.

caseStudies.description: A sample of the automations and platforms we've shipped for clients across industries.
caseStudies.project1Alt: AI Files Management - Smart categorization and organization
caseStudies.project1Desc: Revolutionary document management system that uses advanced AI to automatically categorize, organize, and retrieve files. Features intelligent search capabilities, automated workflows, and seamless integration with existing systems.
caseStudies.project2Alt: AI Invoice Extractor - Extract invoice data intelligently
caseStudies.project2Desc: Advanced OCR and AI-powered invoice processing solution that automates data extraction, validation, and integration with accounting systems. Reduces processing time by 95% while maintaining 99% accuracy.
caseStudies.project3Alt: Residential Access Control - Modern security platform
caseStudies.project3Desc: Next-generation residential security platform featuring biometric authentication, real-time monitoring, and mobile app control. Provides comprehensive access management for modern residential complexes and smart homes.

process.description: A proven process that works for process automations, AI agents, and custom software alike.
process.step1Desc: We start with a deep dive into how your team actually works. We map your manual processes, identify the biggest time sinks, and design the solution architecture.
process.step2Desc: Iterative two-week cycles with working demos at every milestone. Whether it's automation workflows, agent logic, or product features — you see real progress every step.
process.step3Desc: Rigorous testing across all flows and edge cases. We set up monitoring and error alerting so nothing breaks silently once you're live.
process.step4Desc: Deploy to production, configure monitoring, and hand over full documentation. You own everything — code, workflows, and agent configs.
process.ctaTitle: Ready to stop doing things manually?

contact.description: Tell us what your team does manually and we'll build the roadmap to eliminate it. No obligation.
contact.formText: Tell us about your project and we'll respond within 2 hours.
contact.messageLabel: What does your team do manually today?
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe the manual tasks that take up the most time — we'll tell you what we can automate and what it would cost...
contact.calendarText: Schedule a 30-minute call where we map your biggest manual bottlenecks and tell you exactly what we'd automate first.
contact.benefit1Text: Get a prioritized list of automations specific to your business — ordered by time saved and implementation effort.
contact.benefit2Text: We review your current tools and identify the fastest integration path with zero disruption to your ops.
contact.benefit3Text: Get a clear picture of hours saved per week and estimated cost reduction before you commit to anything.
contact.calendarIntegrationText: Book directly through our scheduling system
contact.emailText: For detailed inquiries and project discussions
contact.callText: Speak directly with our solutions team
